news.t: Bitwise Announces Monthly Distributions for IMST, ICOI, IMRA, IGME, ICRC, and IETH
Bitwise Expands Option Income Suite With Launch of Circle, Ethereum Covered Call ETFs; Tickers ICRC and IETH

overview.description: The Bitwise CRCL Option Income Strategy ETF (ICRC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Circle Internet Group, Inc. stock (NYSE: CRCL) through a synthetic covered call strategy ICRC was launched on Oct 1, 2025 and is issued by Bitwise.

data.text: SAN FRANCISCO, May 21, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Bitwise Asset Management, a leading crypto asset manager, today announced the monthly distributions for its suite of Option Income Strategy ETFs: IMST, ICOI...
